note: Desired DNS state for docs (ADR-002). Observed public DNS may still point at GitHub Pages until PR9 cutover. This file is SSOT for verify ladder expectations — not a claim that cutover has happened.

records.comment: Plesk public IPv4 (same as subactor.com / prototypowanie.pl panel host). Confirmed 2026-07-18 via dig A subactor.com.

observed_public.interpretation: GitHub Pages — expected pre-PR9. Public publish-verify must fail (dns_mismatch / tls_san_mismatch).

observed_origin.https_root: 200 Subactor Docs index.html (formal release, not probe)
observed_origin.interpretation: Origin content + marker ready. Public DNS still Pages — do not flip until cert HITL.

docs.subactor.com.observed_note: Public docs.subactor.com still GitHub Pages. Formal origin release active. No production DNS flip until G0–G6 incl. cert HITL.

staging.purpose: Recommended origin/public rehearsal path before production cutover.

observed_public.interpretation: Public still Pages; Plesk subdomain id 309 exists on origin.

staging.blocker: Optional: upload rehearsal release to docs-stage origin; public staging DNS still HITL.

dns_emergency.note: HITL only; restores Pages, not previous Plesk release. TLS SAN still wrong for docs.subactor.com.

content.note: Content rollback available after a previous release exists; first formal release has no previous yet.

dns_provider.blocker: No Cloudflare API token in platform env — DNS-01 cannot run pre-cutover without HITL credentials.

needs_human: Provide Cloudflare API token (or panel) for DNS-01 TXT + later A-record cutover, OR accept HTTP-01 only after DNS flip to Plesk.
Issue LE (or Plesk SSL) with SAN docs.subactor.com (+ optional docs-stage); origin today self-signed CN=Plesk.
HITL boundary DNS mutate Pages CNAME → A 217.160.250.222 only after G0–G6 green (explicit approval).
subscription_rights_note: Customer subactor_customer on webspace subactor.com: manage_subdomains=true, create_domains=true, max_subdom=-1. Connector subdomain-ensure wired. LE XML ApiRpc not implemented; certificate get-pool denied for subscription.
